{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 3,
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The output flags potential issues with citations and claims but doesn't thoroughly audit all claims against the provided evidence.",
    "R1.4": "The output mentions prior work but lacks a clear articulation of the novelty or delta compared to existing methods.",
    "R1.7": "The output identifies some potential citation errors but doesn't comprehensively audit all citations for accuracy and completeness.",
    "RX.1": "The output acknowledges uncertainty regarding specific claims (items 1 & 2) but doesn't systematically assess confidence levels for all recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly adheres to the requested scope, but there are instances where it deviates slightly.",
    "RX.4": "The output does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "While the output highlights some issues, it doesn't provide detailed traceability for all changes made."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "R1.4": 0.6,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The output flags potential issues with citations and claims but doesn't thoroughly audit all claims against the provided evidence.
rationale.R1.4: The output mentions prior work but lacks a clear articulation of the novelty or delta compared to existing methods.
rationale.R1.7: The output identifies some potential citation errors but doesn't comprehensively audit all citations for accuracy and completeness.
rationale.RX.1: The output acknowledges uncertainty regarding specific claims (items 1 & 2) but doesn't systematically assess confidence levels for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adheres to the requested scope, but there are instances where it deviates slightly.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: While the output highlights some issues, it doesn't provide detailed traceability for all changes made.
